bank.retain_mission: Extract discovery findings, coaching feedback, and call-quality patterns across the sales floor.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about discovery questions that uncover pain, coaching themes, and reps' recurring strengths/gaps. Ignore one-off call comments.

mental_models.name: Discovery Playbook
mental_models.source_query: What discovery questions and frameworks consistently surface real pain and budget?

mental_models.name: Coaching Themes
mental_models.source_query: What coaching themes recur across reps, and which interventions have measurably helped?
